title: Characterization of iPSC
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dn650","text":"This protocols is part of the Screening Edited iPSC Clones collection. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":30,"length":39}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BEBD27F0340111E9A58D6132AAED8016","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/untitled-collection-yazfsf6/protocols"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"c75f5","text":"Starting Material: 1 confluent 6 well plate.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a1u0t","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3k5h","text":"Use 2 wells to characterize the iPSC and 4 wells for freezing the iPSC.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"aitsn","text":"Please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for information about hazards, and to obtain advice on safety precautions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Coat T25 flask, chamber slide and plates with Matrigel 01:00:00 prior to passaging.
Wash with 1 mL PBS per well and aspirate.
Add 1 mL Accutase per well of 6 well plate.
Collect cells from 2 wells with 3 mL DMEM/F12 per well and transfer into 15mL conical A.
Collect cells from 4 wells with 3 mL DMEM/F12 per well and transfer into 15mL conical B.
To 15mL conical tube A, add 2 mL mTesR1 and distribute cells.
Karyotype: Add 2 mL of mTesR1 to T25 flask, then add 500 µL cells .
gDNA pellet: 500 µL cells in 1.7 mL tube, spin down at max speed for 00:00:15 , aspirate media, store in -80 °C .
RNA pellet: 900 µL cells in 1.7 mL tube, spin down at max speed for 00:00:15 , aspirate media, store in -80 °C
ICC: Dilute 100 µL cells in 750 µL mTesR1. Plate 200 µL cells per well in 4 wells of a chamber slide.
To 15mL conical tube B, add 4 mL mTesR1 and 4 mL of 2x Freezing Media (20% DMSO, FBS).

Add 1 mL cell suspension to each vial (1 well will freeze down into approximately 2 vials). Cryovials need to be labeled with the following before freezing down: Cell Type Line Name Passage # Date Your Name
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
